scope: Limited schema-hardening draft from four reviewed 2016-17 section groups. Not a full extraction schema freeze.
source_truth_note: Original PDFs remain source truth. Converted Markdown and sections are working text layers. Table/chart/numeric values require separate PDF QA.

change_summary.justification: Observed in reviewed 2016-17 section output, especially Transport and Communications Digital Pakistan Policy text. Needed to record mojibake/replacement-character artifacts separately from broken words or table layout noise.

recommendation: Adopt this vocabulary addition in the next schema revision. No broader schema change is justified from the four-sample stress test.
